languages.text: "Да кто ее знает? Вроде не зверь, а растение, хотя иногда кажется, что мозгов у нее побольше, чем у иного солдата. Одно то, как она кости нацепляет... То тут, то там вылезает — у нас полно о ней баек".

"Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."
languages.original_text: "Да кто ее знает? Вроде не зверь, а растение, хотя иногда кажется, что мозгов у нее побольше, чем у иного солдата. Одно то, как она кости нацепляет... То тут, то там вылезает — у нас полно о ней баек".

traits.locale_text: "Who knows? Hardly a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit. The way it sports bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

"Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

"Who knows? We don't have any scientists here. Maybe it's always been here. Maybe Seberian woke it up when he disappeared. Maybe it flew in on a meteorite or something. But it's always popping up here and there. We've got legends about it. Maybe it's not always the same one, though, just the same species?"

"Who knows? Hardly a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit. The way it sports bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

"Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

"Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

languages.text: 「誰がわかる？科学者もいないし。ずっとここにいたのかも。シベリアが消えた時に目覚めたのかも。隕石に乗って飛んできたのかも。でも、ここかしこに現れる。伝説もある。でも、いつも同じ個体ではないかもしれない。同じ種だけかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "Who knows? We don't have any scientists here. Maybe it's always been here. Maybe Seberian woke it up when he disappeared. Maybe it flew in on a meteorite or something. But it's always popping up here and there. We've got legends about it. Maybe it's not always the same one, though, just the same species?"

traits.locale_text: 「誰がわかる？科学者もいないし。ずっとここにいたのかも。シベリアが消えた時に目覚めたのかも。隕石に乗って飛んできたのかも。でも、ここかしこに現れる。伝説もある。でも、いつも同じ個体ではないかもしれない。同じ種だけかもしれない。」

languages.text: « Allez savoir. Ce n'est pas vraiment une bête, plutôt une sorte de plante, même si elle est plus intelligente que la moyenne des recrues, vu la manière dont elle se sert des ossements et dont elle surgit ici ou là sans crier gare. Nous avons même des légendes à son propos. »
languages.original_text: "Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

traits.locale_text: « Allez savoir. Ce n'est pas vraiment une bête, plutôt une sorte de plante, même si elle est plus intelligente que la moyenne des recrues, vu la manière dont elle se sert des ossements et dont elle surgit ici ou là sans crier gare. Nous avons même des légendes à son propos. »

languages.text: "Kim bilir? Gerçekte bir canavar değil, daha çok bir yabani ot. Gerçi kemikleri kullanış biçimiyle sıradan bir acemi erden daha fazla zekâ gösteriyor... Bir de sağda solda ortaya çıkışıyla tabii. Bu şey hakkında efsanelerimiz bile var."
languages.original_text: "Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

traits.locale_text: "Kim bilir? Gerçekte bir canavar değil, daha çok bir yabani ot. Gerçi kemikleri kullanış biçimiyle sıradan bir acemi erden daha fazla zekâ gösteriyor... Bir de sağda solda ortaya çıkışıyla tabii. Bu şey hakkında efsanelerimiz bile var."

languages.text: «¿Quién sabe? En realidad no es una bestia, sino algún tipo de mala hierba. Aunque parece tener más seso que el recluta medio, a juzgar por el uso que da a los huesos... y el modo en que brota siempre por aquí y allá. Hasta tenemos algunas leyendas sobre él».
languages.original_text: "Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

traits.locale_text: «¿Quién sabe? En realidad no es una bestia, sino algún tipo de mala hierba. Aunque parece tener más seso que el recluta medio, a juzgar por el uso que da a los huesos... y el modo en que brota siempre por aquí y allá. Hasta tenemos algunas leyendas sobre él».

languages.text: “谁知道呢？它不算真正的野兽，更像是一种杂草，不过它比普通的新兵还聪明，看它怎么利用骨头就知道……而且它老是在各个地方冒出来。我们甚至还有关于这玩意儿的一些传说。”
languages.original_text: "Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

traits.locale_text: “谁知道呢？它不算真正的野兽，更像是一种杂草，不过它比普通的新兵还聪明，看它怎么利用骨头就知道……而且它老是在各个地方冒出来。我们甚至还有关于这玩意儿的一些传说。”

languages.text: "Wer weiß? Er ist nicht wirklich ein Tier, eher ein Unkraut, wobei er schlauer ist als jeder gemeine Rekrut, wenn es darum geht, wie er Knochen benutzt ... Und wie er ständig irgendwo auftaucht. Es kursieren sogar Legenden über dieses Ding."
languages.original_text: "Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."

traits.locale_text: "Wer weiß? Er ist nicht wirklich ein Tier, eher ein Unkraut, wobei er schlauer ist als jeder gemeine Rekrut, wenn es darum geht, wie er Knochen benutzt ... Und wie er ständig irgendwo auftaucht. Es kursieren sogar Legenden über dieses Ding."
